message:
fix: align CreateRigBead and CreateGroupBead signatures (gt-4p791p.9)

Both functions now follow the same pattern:
- Take (name string, fields *Fields) instead of inconsistent params
- Construct bead IDs internally instead of requiring callers to do it
- CreateRigBead no longer requires caller to call RigBeadID() first
- CreateGroupBead now takes a GroupFields struct instead of individual params

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
